name: Agentic coding without the cloud: evaluating open-weight large language models on longitudinal data preparation tasks
summary: arXiv:2607.21482v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) and agents are now widely used tools in code development, with data typically sent to third-party cloud-based models. Th...
description: arXiv:2607.21482v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) and agents are now widely used tools in code development, with data typically sent to third-party cloud-based models. Their adoption in research using personal data is constrained by governance requirements that typically prohibit data transmission to external services. Locally deployable open-weight models offer an al...
author: Mack Nixon, Liam Wright, Yevgeniya Kovalchuk, Alison Fang-Wei Wu, Martin Danka, Andy Boyd, David Bann
